debug_info.goal:
f g : ℝ → ℝ
h₀ : ∀ (x y : ℝ), f (x + y) + f (x - y) = 2 * f x * g y
h₁ : ¬∀ (x : ℝ), f x = 0
h₂ : ∀ (x : ℝ), |f x| ≤ 1
⊢ ∀ (x : ℝ), |g x| ≤ 1

failed_attempts:
intro x
  have h₃ : ∃ x₀, f x₀ ≠ 0 := by
    push_neg at h₁
    exact h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ := h₀ x₀ x
  have h₅ := h₀ x₀ 0
  simp at h₅
  have h₆ : |f (x₀ + x) + f (x₀ - x)| ≤ 2 := by
    calc
      |f (x₀ + x) + f (x₀ - x)| ≤ |f (x₀ + x)| + |f (x₀ - x)| := abs_add _ _
      _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by linarith [h₂ (x₀ + x), h₂ (x₀ - x)]
      _ = 2 := by norm_num
  rw [h₄] at h₆
  have h₇ : |2 * f x₀ * g x| ≤ 2 := h₆
  have h₈ : |f x₀| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  calc
    |g x| = |2 * f x₀ * g x| / |2 * f x₀| := by field_simp [h₈.ne', mul_comm]
    _ ≤ 2 / |2 * f x₀| := div_le_div (by linarith) (by positivity) (by positivity)
    _ = 1 / |f x₀| := by field_simp
    _ ≤ 1 := by
      apply (div_le_one (by positivity)).mpr
      exact (by linarith [h₂ x₀])

    exact h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₃

  have h₆ := h₂ (x₀ - x)
  rw [abs_le] at *
  constructor <;> nlinarith [h₅.1, h₅.2, h₆.1, h₆.2, h₄, hx₀]

intro x
  have h₃ : ∃ x₀, f x₀ ≠ 0 := by
    push_neg at h₁
    exact h₁
  obtain ⟨x₀, hx₀⟩ := h₃
  have h₄ := h₀ x₀ x
  have h₅ : |f (x₀ + x) + f (x₀ - x)| ≤ 2 := by
    calc
      |f (x₀ + x) + f (x₀ - x)| ≤ |f (x₀ + x)| + |f (x₀ - x)| := abs_add _ _
      _ ≤ 1 + 1 := by linarith [h₂ (x₀ + x), h₂ (x₀ - x)]
      _ = 2 := by norm_num
  rw [h₄] at h₅
  have h₆ : |2 * f x₀ * g x| ≤ 2 := h₅
  have h₇ : |f x₀| > 0 := abs_pos.mpr hx₀
  calc
    |g x| = |2 * f x₀ * g x| / |2 * f x₀| := by field_simp [h₇.ne', mul_assoc]
    _ ≤ 2 / |2 * f x₀| := div_le_div (by linarith) (by positivity) (by positivity)
    _ = 1 / |f x₀| := by field_simp
    _ ≤ 1 := by
      apply (div_le_one (by positivity)).mpr
      exact (by linarith [h₂ x₀])
